title: Motor Vehicle Registration not operational on Saturdays currently
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Due to unforeseen circumstances, the Motor Vehicle Registration (MVR) next to the train station in Hibernia Street will not be operational on Saturdays for the foreseeable future.


> The operational hours at MVR in Hibernia Street are from 08:00 to 15:00 on weekdays. Contact MVR at 044 801 9310.


The Blanco MVR is also operational from 08:00 to 15:00 on weekdays.

They have a drive-through service for license renewals and do bulk dealer transactions.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
